constitutional_amendments.text: knowledge gained must be shared openly
surplus resources distributed equally each year
emergency powers expire after 5 years automatically
sub-simulations are a right, not a privilege

meta_awareness_events: Titan (year 31): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
Ares-18 (year 32): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
Phobos (year 33): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
Lyra (year 34): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
